title: Joint SPF/RDY Hearing: V-22 Osprey Program Update
description: The subcommittees are convening this hearing to review the joint response to several aviation safety mishaps and low readiness numbers over the past five years. Witnesses will provide testimony on the effectiveness of Department of Defense efforts to strengthen oversight, improve risk management, ensure operational safety, and meet future operational requirements.
text:
The subcommittees are convening this hearing to review the joint response to several aviation safety mishaps and low readiness numbers over the past five years. Witnesses will provide testimony on the effectiveness of Department of Defense efforts to strengthen oversight, improve risk management, ensure operational safety, and meet future operational requirements.
This hearing examines the findings of the 2025 NAVAIR V-22 Comprehensive Review.
Rep. Kelly Opening Statement
Rep. Bergman Opening Statement
Witnesses:
Vice Admiral John E. Dougherty IV, USN
Commander
Naval Air Systems Command
Brigadier General David C. Walsh, USMC
Program Executive Officer, Air Anti-Submarine Warfare, Assault & Special Mission Programs
Naval Air Systems Command
Ms. Diana Moldafsky
Director, Defense Capabilities and Management
Government Accountability Office
